episodes.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
title_options: FIFA World Cup 2026 - The Biggest Tournament Ever
World Cup 2026: 48 Teams, 3 Nations, 1 Trophy
FIFA World Cup 2026: History in the Making
2026 World Cup - The Ultimate Preview
World Cup 2026: USA, Mexico & Canada United
episodes.description: FIFA World Cup 2026 is here! 48 teams, 3 host nations, 104 matches across 16 stadiums. The biggest sporting event on the planet. From the streets of New York to the pyramids of Mexico.
episodes.subtitle: The biggest World Cup ever
script: Welcome to FIFA World Cup 2026. This is the first World Cup with 48 teams, hosted by three nations: the United States, Mexico and Canada. A total of 104 matches across 16 stadiums. A tournament that will make history.
Three host nations, three different cultures. From the streets of New York to the pyramids of Mexico. This World Cup promises an unforgettable spectacle.
For the first time, 48 nations compete for the most coveted trophy in sports. The new format brings more matches, more excitement, and more stars than ever before.

episodes.title: World Cup 2026 Stadiums
title_options: World Cup 2026 Stadiums - 16 Iconic Venues
FIFA World Cup 2026: Inside the Stadiums
2026 World Cup Stadiums Tour - USA, Mexico, Canada
World Cup 2026: The Most Epic Stadiums Ever
16 Stadiums, 3 Countries, One World Cup
episodes.description: Explore the 16 incredible stadiums hosting FIFA World Cup 2026 across USA, Mexico and Canada. From MetLife Stadium to Estadio Azteca, each venue tells a story.
episodes.subtitle: 16 temples of football
script: 16 modern stadiums across three countries host the World Cup 2026 matches. From MetLife Stadium in New York to Azteca Stadium in Mexico City, each venue has its own story.
MetLife Stadium is the largest with 82,000 seats. The grand final on July 19th will be played there. SoFi Stadium in Los Angeles and AT&T Stadium in Dallas are also ready to host.
Canada brings BC Place in Vancouver and BMO Field in Toronto. Mexico proudly presents Estadio Azteca, one of the most iconic stadiums in world football.

2026 World Cup Stars - Who Will Dominate?
episodes.description: The biggest stars of world football meet in 2026. Vinicius Junior, Kylian Mbappe, Jude Bellingham and more. Who will be the hero of this World Cup?
episodes.subtitle: The best players on the planet
script: The biggest stars of world football meet in 2026. Vinicius Junior, Brazil's Real Madrid star, is one of the favorites for the golden boot. His speed and technique are extraordinary.
Kylian Mbappe arrives as France's champion. Jude Bellingham leads England. Lautaro Martinez carries Argentina's hopes. Lamine Yamal, Spain's young talent, promises magic.
Neymar, Salah, De Bruyne, Haaland... the stars never end. This World Cup is the biggest stage for the greatest talents.

The Heart of World Cup 2026: The Fans
episodes.description: Millions of fans from around the world fill stadiums and public squares. Three host nations, one shared passion: football. The atmosphere is electric at FIFA World Cup 2026.
episodes.subtitle: The passion that unites the world
script: Millions of fans from around the world fill stadiums and public squares. Three host nations, three different cultures, one shared passion: football.
From the streets of Mexico City to the squares of New York, the atmosphere is electric. Brazilian, Argentine, German, Japanese fans... all united in one giant celebration.
The fans create the spectacle. The songs, the dances, the flags and the emotions make every match unique. Without the fans, football would never be the same.

episodes.description: The goals, the spectacle, the emotions. FIFA World Cup 2026 gives us unforgettable moments. From the opening match to the final, every moment matters.
episodes.subtitle: Moments to remember forever
script: The goals, the spectacle, the emotions. FIFA World Cup 2026 gives us unforgettable moments. From the opening matches to the final, every moment matters.
Who will lift the trophy? Argentina to defend the title? France to dominate again? Brazil to return to glory? Or a surprise like Morocco?
Thank you for watching this incredible World Cup. Subscribe for more analysis, highlights and exclusives from FIFA World Cup 2026!
